mapper.insert: INSERT INTO WORKPLACE_MEMBERS (WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, ROLE, WAGE_TYPE, HOURLY_WAGE, MONTHLY_WAGE, MEMO, RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH, STATUS) VALUES (#{workplaceId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{wageType}, #{hourlyWage}, #{monthlyWage}, #{memo}, #{receiveAttendancePush}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, ROLE, WAGE_TYPE, HOURLY_WAGE, MONTHLY_WAGE, MEMO, RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH, STATUS, BREAK_MINUTES, USE_WEEKLY_HOLIDAY_PAY FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT 1

SELECT WM.WORKPLACE_ID, W.NAME AS WORKPLACE_NAME, W.IS_PERSONAL, WM.RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WHERE WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ROLE NOT IN ('OWNER', 'SUPER_ADMIN')) AS MEMBER_COUNT FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN WORKPLACES W ON W.ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID INNER JOIN USERS U ON U.ID = W.OWNER_ID WHERE WM.USER_ID = #{userId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND U.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY WM.ID DESC

SELECT WM.ID AS memberId, WM.USER_ID AS userId, U.NAME AS name, U.PROFILE_COLOR AS profileColor, WM.ROLE AS role, WM.WAGE_TYPE AS wageType, WM.HOURLY_WAGE AS hourlyWage, WM.MONTHLY_WAGE AS monthlyWage, WM.STATUS AS status, WM.MEMO AS memo, WM.BREAK_MINUTES AS breakMinutes, WM.USE_WEEKLY_HOLIDAY_PAY AS useWeeklyHolidayPay, WM.JOINED_AT AS joinedAt, IF((SELECT STATUS FROM LABOR_CONTRACTS WHERE WORKPLACE_ID = WM.WORKPLACE_ID AND EMPLOYEE_USER_ID = WM.USER_ID ORDER BY CREATED_AT DESC LIMIT 1) = 'SIGNED', 'Y', 'N') AS contractSigned FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WM INNER JOIN USERS U ON U.ID = WM.USER_ID WHERE WM.WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND WM.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND WM.ROLE <> 'OWNER' ORDER BY U.NAME ASC, WM.ID ASC

SELECT ID, WORKPLACE_ID, USER_ID, ROLE, WAGE_TYPE, HOURLY_WAGE, MONTHLY_WAGE, MEMO, RECEIVE_ATTENDANCE_PUSH, STATUS, BREAK_MINUTES, USE_WEEKLY_HOLIDAY_PAY FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WHERE WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ROLE <> 'OWNER' ORDER BY ID ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WORKPLACE_MEMBERS WHERE WORKPLACE_ID = #{workplaceId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ROLE <> 'OWNER'
